meaning: vt.使不灭,使不朽,使名垂千古
examples: He would immortalize her in a poem.
The parliament said it would immortalize the Russian leader's name.
Please sit for me in the studio, "he pleaded, and l will immortalize your beauty."
And not only that, he has found a way to immortalize the teaching of his financial strategies.
So consumers were out using their digital SLRs and point-and-shoots to immortalize their time and space whatever distance they went.
